name: PRG Corporation Public Company Limited
summary: Patum Rice Mill and Granary Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the processing and packaging of rice and related business in Thailand, the United States, Canada, Europe, the Asia Pacific, and internationally. It operates through two segments, Improving the Quality and Packaging of Milled Rice, and Food Center Business. The company offers organic, Japanese, and quinoa rice, as well as rice berry granola; maboonkrong plus, white, hom mali, and other rice products; and other products, such as NUTRA ORIS 10 capsules, as well as drinking water. It is also involved in the rental of warehouse and factory building; operation of a food center; distribution of rice; and provision of transportation service. The company was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Pathum Thani, Thailand. Patum Rice Mill and Granary Public Company Limited is a subsidiary of MBK Public Company Limited.
